stories.title: World Cup 2026 Power Rankings after one game: U.S....
stories.summary: All 48 teams have played one group game, so let's revisit our Power Rankings. What do our writers and experts think the field of favorites looks like after one week?

stories.title: How teams can qualify for knockout rounds: Clinchi...
stories.summary: Who can secure qualification before the group stage ends, and whose World Cup dreams could be shattered?

stories.title: Korea GK gaffe helps Mexico clinch 1st in Group A
stories.summary: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 on Thursday and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup.

stories.title: Canada, Marsch 'shaken' by gruesome Koné injury
stories.summary: Canada midfielder Ismaël Koné was stretchered off the field in the second half of the host nation's match against Qatar on Thursday at BC Place in Vancouver.

stories.title: Niemann penalized for throwing club in U.S. Open
stories.summary: The United States Golf Association docked Joaquín Niemann two strokes for throwing a club during the opening round.
